details.quote: Data relating to your use of our Services: IP address, device ID, user agent, location data, browser type and version, operating system and platform, and other online identifiers collected from [Cookies](https://www.linkedin.com/legal/cookie-policy) and other similar technologies
details.what_is_tracked: Online identifiers (IP address, device ID, user agent, location data, browser/OS details)

details.quote: For LinkedIn to use non-essential cookies and similar tracking technologies to identify Members, to deliver ads, and to conduct analytics related to user interaction with LinkedIn pages, advertising and research purposes.
details.what_is_tracked: User interaction with LinkedIn pages, advertising, and research purposes

details.quote: Data relating to your use of our Services: IP address, device ID, user agent, location data, browser type and version, operating system and platform, and other online identifiers collected from [Cookies](https://www.linkedin.com/legal/cookie-policy) and similar technologies
details.what_is_tracked: Online identifiers for ads personalization and measurement

mentions_legales.label: Adresse de courrier électronique
mentions_legales.quote: Our Data Protection Officer can be contacted directly using this [form](https://www.linkedin.com/help/linkedin/ask/TSO-DPO)

mentions_legales.label: Hébergeur : dénomination
mentions_legales.quote: LinkedIn Corporation's data centres in the US

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Coordonnées du DPO
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Our Data Protection Officer can be contacted directly using this [form](https://www.linkedin.com/help/linkedin/ask/TSO-DPO)

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Types de données collectées + raison
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Data relating to your use of our Services: IP address, device ID, user agent, location data, browser type and version, operating system and platform, and other online identifiers collected from [Cookies](https://www.linkedin.com/legal/cookie-policy) and other similar technologies.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Base légale du traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Where we rely on legitimate interests we balance the interests the processing supports against your rights and freedoms before processing your personal data, and you have the right to object or to ask for restriction of our processing we describe in this notice at any time.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Caractère obligatoire/facultatif + conséquences
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Where we rely on consent, you can withdraw your consent at any time, however this will not affect our use of your data up to that point.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Durée de conservation des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We generally retain your personal data as long as you keep your account open or as needed to provide you Services.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Destinataires des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: LinkedIn may also share your data with third-party service providers and processors. These include our parent company, Microsoft, cloud service providers, content delivery networks, telecommunications providers, maintenance providers, Member support providers, development service providers, market researchers, anti-fraud and anti-abuse services providers, marketing and analytics providers, payment processors, external auditors and advisors, managed services providers, consultancy and professional services firms, such as legal and tax advisors.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Prise de décision automatisée
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: To use automated systems such as generative AI to detect and prevent harmful content on your feed and in [messages](https://www.linkedin.com/help/linkedin/answer/a1341705), and train and improve our AI systems for these trust and security-related purposes.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Sécurité des données (art. 32 RGPD)
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: To help protect you, us, or others from threats, we log users' activity on LinkedIn to identify and investigate harmful or fraudulent behaviour that violates our [User Agreement](https://www.linkedin.com/legal/user-agreement).

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Collecte indirecte : catégories concernées
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Information from advertising [partners](https://www.linkedin.com/legal/privacy-policy#key-terms-2), vendors and [publishers](https://www.linkedin.com/help/linkedin/answer/85809?trk=microsites-frontend_legal_privacy-policy&lang=en) (e.g., LinkedIn advertiser customers who install a LinkedIn [tag](https://www.linkedin.com/help/lms/answer/a427660/) on their websites)

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Collecte indirecte : source des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Information from advertising partners, vendors and publishers

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'introduire une plainte (CNIL)
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: If you have a concern or complaint about the use of your personal data that you feel has not been addressed by us, you always have the right to raise a concern with the supervisory authority in your jurisdiction.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit de rectification
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: You can ask us to change, rectify or not use your data if it is not accurate.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'accès
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Members can access and download their data at any time.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à l'effacement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: You can request that we delete your personal data.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à la limitation du traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: You can also request that processing of your data is restricted if the data is inaccurate or if you believe that the processing is unlawful by using the details in the 'Contact Us' Section below or by using this [form](https://www.linkedin.com/help/linkedin/ask/TS-DPRO).

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à la portabilité
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: If we use your personal data to perform a contract with you, or with your consent, you have the right to receive your data and port it to another controller.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'opposition
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: You also have the right to object to processing your data where legitimate interest or public interest is the legal basis for processing that data.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Date de dernière mise à jour de la politique

cookies.label: Retrait du consentement simple et à tout moment
Information sur le Responsable de Traitement
Finalité des cookies (claire et complète)
cookies.quote: For LinkedIn to use non-essential cookies and similar tracking technologies to identify Members, to deliver ads, and to conduct analytics related to user interaction with LinkedIn pages, advertising and research purposes.

cookies.label: Durée de conservation des cookies
cookies.quote: For data collected from third party websites where a LinkedIn customer has installed LinkedIn’s tag, LinkedIn de-identifies your personal data after 7 days and permanently deletes it after 180 days.

cookies.label: Liste des partenaires à jour
cookies.quote: You can [learn more](https://members.linkedin.com/en-gb/privacy-in-advertising) about the ad technologies we use, our advertising services and our advertising partners.

cookies.label: Détail des finalités (2e niveau)
cookies.quote: To display, measure, and improve certain personalised (not contextual) ads on and off LinkedIn that are relevant to your interests, based on certain data we observe or infer about you from use of our Services.

cookies.label: Détail des types de cookies déposés
cookies.quote: Data relating to your use of our Services: IP address, device ID, user agent, location data, browser type and version, operating system and platform, and other online identifiers collected from [Cookies](https://www.linkedin.com/legal/cookie-policy) and other similar technologies

cookies.label: Distinction fonctionnels / publicitaires
cookies.quote: To display, measure, and improve certain personalised (not contextual) ads on and off LinkedIn that are relevant to your interests

cookies.label: Outil de mesure d'audience mentionné
cookies.quote: To perform analytics to provide aggregated workforce and salary insights to Members, customers and others based on Member-provided data.

cookies.label: Consentement requis pour l'outil statistique
cookies.quote: Where we rely on consent, you can withdraw your consent at any time

transferts_hors_ue.label: Existence de transferts hors UE + destinataires
transferts_hors_ue.quote: LinkedIn may transfer personal data outside of the Designated Countries and the UK as part of its Services e.g. LinkedIn stores personal data on its servers located in the US

transferts_hors_ue.label: Stockage cloud hors UE + localisation serveurs
transferts_hors_ue.quote: LinkedIn stores personal data on its servers located in the US
